nodes.summary_zh: agent 计划→行动→观察结果→修正→再行动，直到达标或触发停止条件的闭环过程；loop engineering 设计的对象。
nodes.summary_en: The closed cycle in which an agent plans, acts, observes the result, adjusts, and acts again until acceptance or a stop condition — the object that loop engineering designs.

nodes.summary_zh: 设计一个替你给 agent 发提示的系统——发现任务、分配、检查结果、记录状态、决定下一步——而不是人逐轮提示。其内核是验证工程。
nodes.summary_en: Designing the system that prompts the agent — discovering work, dispatching it, checking results, recording state, deciding the next step — instead of a human prompting turn-by-turn. At its core it is verification engineering.

nodes.summary_zh: OpenAI 描述的单轮内循环：模型请求工具调用→系统执行→把输出追加回上下文→重新查询模型，重复直到模型不再调用工具并返回最终消息。
nodes.summary_en: OpenAI's intra-turn inner loop: the model requests a tool call, the system executes it, appends the output back to context, and re-queries the model, repeating until the model stops calling tools and returns a final message.

nodes.summary_zh: loop 之下一层：围绕 agent 的脚手架、约束与反馈循环的完整环境——仓库结构、CI、linter、格式化、包管理、框架、项目指令、工具集成。工程师从写代码转向设计环境。
nodes.summary_en: The layer beneath the loop: the full environment of scaffolding, constraints, and feedback loops around an agent — repo structure, CI, linters, formatting, package managers, frameworks, project instructions, tool integration. The engineer's job shifts from writing code to designing the environment.

nodes.summary_zh: Osmani 的内核：loop engineering 是替换掉你这个发提示的人，转而设计一个替你发提示的系统；人从循环内的操作员上移为循环之上的设计者。
nodes.summary_en: Osmani's core: loop engineering is replacing yourself as the person who prompts the agent and designing the system that does it instead; the human moves from operator inside the loop to designer above it.

nodes.summary_zh: prompt（优化一句话）→ context（喂对材料）→ harness（搭好运行环境）→ loop（设计反复行动-验证-修正-停止的系统）。每层优化对象不同。注：四段式是综合框架，非 Osmani 原文逐字。
nodes.summary_en: prompt (optimize one instruction) → context (feed the right material) → harness (build the run environment) → loop (design the act-verify-adjust-stop system). Each layer optimizes a different thing. Note: the four-stage framing is a synthesis, not stated verbatim by Osmani.

nodes.summary_zh: 推理与行动交错于同一轨迹并相互增强：推理帮助归纳/跟踪/更新计划并处理异常，行动与外部来源交互获取信息。即 loop 概括的 Act→Observe→Adjust 双向循环。
nodes.summary_en: Interleaves reasoning and acting in one trajectory so they reinforce each other: reasoning induces, tracks, and updates plans and handles exceptions, while acting interfaces with external sources for information. This is the Act→Observe→Adjust bidirectional cycle the loop generalizes.

nodes.summary_zh: 无权重更新的语言强化：agent 对反馈口头反思并存入情景记忆缓冲以改进后续 trial，HumanEval 达 91% pass@1（>GPT-4 的 80%）。但 91% 依赖自生成测试，把瓶颈转移到正确生成测试——奖励作弊的雏形。
nodes.summary_en: Weight-free verbal reinforcement: the agent reflects on feedback and stores reflective text in an episodic memory buffer to improve later trials, reaching 91% pass@1 on HumanEval (vs GPT-4's 80%). But the 91% relies on self-generated tests, shifting the bottleneck to correct test generation — reward hacking in embryo.

nodes.summary_zh: 测试期迭代精炼：单个 LLM 担任生成器/反馈者/精炼者，生成→自评→精炼→重复，无监督数据、无额外训练、无 RL。批评集中于效力而非机制。是 maker/checker 同体的反例动机。
nodes.summary_en: Test-time iterative refinement: a single LLM as generator, critic, and refiner — generate, self-critique, refine, repeat — with no supervised data, training, or RL. Critiques target efficacy, not the mechanism. Motivates maker/checker SEPARATION by showing the limits of self-grading.

nodes.summary_zh: 形式化为：将输出与标准 S 比较，进入精炼循环直到条件满足（停止谓词 Q ≜ y⊨S）。三种失败模式：反馈有缺陷时收敛次优、级联失败、撞墙——都需精心设计的终止条件。
nodes.summary_en: Formalized as: compare output against a standard S and iterate refinement until the condition holds (stop predicate Q ≜ y⊨S). Three failure modes: converging on a suboptimum when feedback is flawed, cascading failure, and head-banging — all requiring carefully designed termination conditions.
